name: Archon1
description: Robotically evolved archaerhodopsin variant with improved brightness, millisecond kinetics, and exceptional photostability for long-duration recordings.

kinetics.note: Bi-exponential fast component at 22°C in spiking HEK cells (93% on, 94% off); slow τ_on=13 ms, slow τ_off=17 ms

dynamicRangeData.note: Per 100 mV step in spiking HEK cells at 22°C
